form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a nose at Gunnedah over 340m (20.03) beating Sneaky Mouse in Grade 5 on April 4. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by a nose at Gunnedah over 340m (20.03) beating Sneaky Mouse in Grade 5 on April 4. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the catching pen checked off the back and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 6th on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind More Rain beaten 19 lengths (24.17) in a Grade 5. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 6th on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind More Rain beaten 19 lengths (24.17) in a Grade 5. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on March 24 over 388m at this track behind Invisible Man beaten 6 lengths (22.89) in a Grade 5. Has claims if at her best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on March 24 over 388m at this track behind Invisible Man beaten 6 lengths (22.89) in a Grade 5. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tough draw to overcome and needs to find best form to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tough draw to overcome and needs to find best form to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together rounding the turn out of the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (22.96) over 388m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (22.96) over 388m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 19 length eighth over 388m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 19 length eighth over 388m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Poor last start but ran a better race two back when fourth over 388m at this track. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Poor last start but ran a better race two back when fourth over 388m at this track. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn was tightened for room and lost ground momentarily.

form.formComment: Caught the eye on debut when making light work of a wide draw with a fast early sectional and clocking 22.34 in a 1.75 lengths win at this track over 388m. Shows good promise and expected to feature again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Caught the eye on debut when making light work of a wide draw with a fast early sectional and clocking 22.34 in a 1.75 lengths win at this track over 388m. Shows good promise and expected to feature again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the home straight shifted in and came together.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last three starts, most recently over 400m at The Gardens. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at her last three starts, most recently over 400m at The Gardens. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Tiny Sniffy over 388m. Major threat on best form.

formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Tiny Sniffy over 388m. Major threat on best form.
